calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ma Dora Francisco, 559-429-1071 Respondent in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Respondent has no objections. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER AMERICAN ARRAY SOLAR INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

GRANT. No opposition filed. The Court will sign the proposed order and judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Continued To Jun-14-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER AMERICAN ARRAY SOLAR INC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD

Appearances: William M. Woolman of Sagaser Watkins & Wieland PC (559.421.7000) appearing via Court Call for petitioner and moving party; Ma Dora Francisco (559.429.1071) respondent and opposing party appearing in propria persona

Counsel informs the Court the proof of service to the motion was filed. Counsel and respondent meet and confer off the record on the issue of a continued hearing date. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues the matter to June 14, 2019 on agreement of the parties. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com) (302/RBU)
